title: BKASH_SIM liquidity pressure requires review
reason: Estimated provider runway is below the warning threshold and repeated cash-in amounts increased during the last hour.
uncertainty: Confidence is reduced if the provider feed becomes delayed.
recommended_next_step: Verify feed freshness and ask the assigned operations owner to review provider float requirements.

title: ROCKET_SIM feed delay may reduce forecast confidence
reason: Provider position data has not refreshed within the expected window.
uncertainty: Runway estimates for delayed providers should be treated as provisional.
recommended_next_step: Verify provider feed status and contact operations if the delay continues.
